TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_P‚Äôanoh, title = P‚Äôanoh, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/P‚Äôanoh} }

S.FORM: P'anoh Itiniay i Nanzhuang Cen no Miaoli ko P'anoh a niyaro', 48 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 155 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 95% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 147 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 5% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 8 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Tayal83%, Saysiyat8%, Amis1%, Paiwan1%, Bunun1%, Seediq1%, roma1%. Ira ko imeng i niyaro'.
S.PHON: p °ano~uńß itiniaj i nan*ńßo~u~uaŇč ¶…ôn no~u miao~u…ĺi ko~u p °ano~uńß a nijaro~u °, ** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u paro~u…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺo~uma °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u tam…¨~…ģaw. **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u jin ¶o~umin, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u ro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, * ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u tam…¨~…ģaw no~u kasafina ¶a…¨~…ģan i, ko~u taja…ĺ**%, sajsijat*%, amis*%, paiwan*%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un*%, s…ô…ô…¨~…ģi**%, ro~uma*%. ira ko~u im…ôŇč i nijaro~u °.
S.FORM: P'anoh Itiniay i Nanzhuang Cen no Miaoli ko P'anoh a niyaro', 48 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 155 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 95% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 147 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 5% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 8 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Tayal83%, Saysiyat8%, Amis1%, Paiwan1%, Bunun1%, Seediq1%, roma1%. Ira ko imeng i niyaro'.
S.PHON: p °ano~uńß itiniaj i nan*ńßo~u~uaŇč ¶…ôn no~u miao~u…ĺi ko~u p °ano~uńß a nijaro~u °, ** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u paro~u…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺo~uma °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u tam…¨~…ģaw. **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u jin ¶o~umin, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u ro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, * ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u tam…¨~…ģaw no~u kasafina ¶a…¨~…ģan i, ko~u taja…ĺ**%, sajsijat*%, amis*%, paiwan*%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un*%, s…ô…ô…¨~…ģi**%, ro~uma*%. ira ko~u im…ôŇč i nijaro~u °.
